description_long: This is a male adult pedestrian dressed in modern, urban streetwear. He wears a high-collared, fitted sweater and athletic jogger pants with bold, angular patterns on the legs. His shoes are sporty and streamlined, suitable for walking or running in an urban environment. The individual has a distinctive hairstyle with voluminous, styled hair and appears to be wearing a face covering or mask that covers the lower half of his face. The overall appearance is contemporary and stylish, with a focus on comfort and mobility. The figure's posture is relaxed but alert, with arms slightly bent and feet apart.
description: A male adult in modern streetwear with a high-collared sweater, patterned jogger pants, and sporty shoes, featuring a voluminous hairstyle and face covering. The look is urban, stylish, and practical.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-collared sweater, face covering, and detailed patterns on the jogger pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face covering, the fit of the sweater, and the angular design on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sweater, the full pattern on the pants, and the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the continuation of the pants' design.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted high-collared sweater and athletic jogger pants with angular patterns, face covering
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent and feet apart
